table_data.extraction_notes: Second SKU reconstructed as 'WPMA3434-NL' from split OCR text 'WPMA3434-' and 'NL' on following line. Line totals and subtotal match: 57.20 + 1,042.00 = 1,099.20. Tax of 92.06 produces invoice total 1,191.26, consistent with 'TOTAL DUE' amount.
